meaning: adj.代表两种人种的(尤指黑人与白人)
examples: And I found out that he was biracial.
It's hard to explain to a biracial child in 2011.
Children go through changes while growing up, especially biracial children.
Obama presents himself as uniquely situated to bridge those two cultures because of his biracial heritage.
Growing up in a biracial family, Jeter was subjected to hurtful racial epithets spewed by ignorant people.
